name: Wilson Learning Worldwide Inc.
summary: Wilson Learning Worldwide Inc. provides human resource and organizational development consulting and solutions in Japan, China, Europe, North America, Asia Pacific, and internationally. It assesses, develops, delivers, reinforces, and sustains learning solutions. The company offers solutions for sales and leadership, including employee engagement, salesforce development, leadership development, strategy alignment, business transformation, and workforce upskilling, as well as learning solutions. It serves clients in 50 countries and 30 languages. The company was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
